setupPipes.P1: pipeline new Sender DInputProcessor DDataSigner DPacketSender
setupPipes.P2: pipeline new RecverSender DPacketSender DDataSigner DInputSimulator DInputSimulator
pipeline new RecverCallback NetworkCallbacks DDataSigner DInputSimulator DInputSimulator
pipeline new LocalCallback DInputProcessor DInputSimulator SHookManager
setupPipes.P3: pipeline new InputProcess DInputReader DInputMerger DInputProcessor
setupPipes.P4: pipeline new HookManagerInputProcess SHookManager DInputMerger DInputProcessor

Client.Cl1: pipeline new Recver NetworkCallbacks DDataSigner DInputSimulator SHookManager

Client2.Cl1: pipeline new Recver NetworkCallbacks DDataSigner DInputSimulator DInputSimulator
Client2.Cl2: pipeline new HookManagerInputProcess SHookManager DInputMerger DInputProcessor

Server.Se1: pipeline new ReadInputAndProcess DInputReader DInputMerger VScriptedInputProcessor
Server.Se2: pipeline new Sender DInputProcessor DDataSigner DPacketSender

Server2.Se1: pipeline new ReadInputAndProcess DInputReader DInputMerger VScriptedInputProcessor
Server2.Se2: pipeline new Sender DInputProcessor DDataSigner DPacketSender
